title: Baseline Preservation And Design Contract
scope: Establish the compatibility contract and tactical story boundaries for the expansion. Add or adjust baseline characterization tests only where needed to preserve existing public behavior before larger changes.
inputs: Focused target files as needed: src/adeptus_testus/facility.py, src/adeptus_testus/cli.py, tests/test_facility.py, README.md, pyproject.toml
outputs: bounded story packets for compatibility characterization and design-boundary work
acceptance_criteria: Baseline public behavior is explicitly captured in story-level acceptance criteria or focused tests without weakening existing tests.
Tactical plan defines bounded stories that avoid broad rewrites and preserve default scenario and CLI compatibility.
No production behavior is changed except narrowly to preserve or clarify existing baseline behavior if a reviewed story requires it.
suggested_story_boundaries: Characterize baseline CLI/model/save-load behavior and identify any missing preservation tests.
Define focused implementation contracts for graph, scenario, incident, report, CLI, and docs without implementing later milestones.
Optional narrow baseline repair only if existing behavior unexpectedly fails; route through Enginseer and Inquisitor.
non_goals: Do not implement graph/pathing, alternate scenarios, incidents, reports, expanded CLI options, or README expansion in this milestone unless needed only as compatibility scaffolding.
Do not delete existing tests to make future work easier.
Do not read prior .adeptus/runs artifacts except the named baseline evidence.
dependency_summary: Depends only on the root intake summary, baseline validation evidence, and focused current repo files. No prior milestone is required.
change_boundary: Allowed product files if story packets require them: tests/test_facility.py and narrowly related source files for baseline preservation only.
test_policy: Use focused pytest tests for baseline preservation. Final story validation should include relevant pytest selection or full pytest when cheap.
validation_expectations: MCP syntax and pytest validation remain passing by milestone completion.
Cleanup runtime cache/temp artifacts before handoff.
context_rules: Lexmechanic reads this contract and intake-summary only.
Enginseer receives story packets only and reads focused target files named there.
If more context is needed, stop for explicit packet update or escalation.
